hypothesis_en: Mr President, Mr Erzog, in accordance with the agenda, we now proceed to the debate on the oral question to the Commission on the application of the Directive 73d of the European Communities by the United Kingdom between 1978 and 2001.
reference_en: thank you very much indeed Mr Herzog and now in accordance with the agenda we move on to the debate on an oral question to the European Commission relative to the implementation of Directive seventy-three stroke two three nine stroke EEC by the United Kingdom between nineteen seventy-eight and two thousand and one this ha= has been tabled on behalf to of the PPE-DE group so I'll give the floor to the tabler Mr Perry you have six minutes
source_es: muchas gracias Señor Herzog de conformidad con el orden del día procedemos ahora al debate sobre la pregunta oral a la Comisión que trata de la aplicación de la Directiva setenta y tres barra doscientos treinta y nueve de las Comunidades Europeas por el Reino Unido entre mil novecientos setenta y ocho y dos mil uno la pregunta se realiza en nombre del Grupo del Partido Popular Europeo y Demócratas Europeos y tiene la palabra su autor el Señor Perry durante seis minutos
